title: aws-kms: returns InvalidUri at runtime for unsupported algorithm
description: secretx-aws-kms/src/lib.rs sign() returns SecretError::InvalidUri when the algorithm is Ed25519 (not supported by KMS). The URI was already validated at construction; this error fires at sign() call time. Trigger: constructed AwsKmsBackend + caller calls sign() → receives InvalidUri, which callers interpret as a configuration/parse error rather than a capability mismatch. Should return SecretError::Unavailable or SecretError::Backend.
